testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_neno_exchange.py:27: in test_health_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_deposit_invalid_tx_hash_format
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_neno_exchange.py:112: in test_verify_deposit_invalid_tx_hash_format assert response.status_code in [400, 422] E assert 401 in [400, 422] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_deposit_valid_format_nonexistent_tx
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_neno_exchange.py:130: in test_verify_deposit_valid_format_nonexistent_tx assert response.status_code in [400, 404, 503] E assert 401 in [400, 404, 503] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_sell_insufficient_balance_returns_proper_error
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_neno_exchange.py:163: in test_sell_insufficient_balance_returns_proper_error assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
